executive_summary.overview: Passive reconnaissance against example.com surfaced 11 findings, with 1 finding flagged as INTERESTING (weak CSP directive). No critical issues were discovered during the passive scan.
key_findings: Multiple missing security headers (HSTS, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options).
recommendations: Tighten Content-Security-Policy and remove unsafe directives.
Add HSTS with preload and includeSubDomains.
Strip or normalize the Server header.
executive_summary.impact_assessment: Low immediate impact; primarily defense-in-depth gaps.
